name: libconvert-binhex-perl
title: libconvert-binhex-perl
summary: Perl5 module for extracting data from macintosh BinHex files
description:
Perl5 module for extracting data from macintosh BinHex files
Convert::BinHex is a format used by Macintosh for transporting Mac files safely
through electronic mail, as short-lined, 7-bit, semi-compressed data
streams. This module provides a means of converting those data streams
back into binary data.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libconvert-binhex-perl because Perl5 module for extracting data from macintosh BinHex files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libconvert-binhex-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libconvert-binhex-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libconvert-binhex-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
